name: It´s 50°C outside, welcome your new roommate!
description:
You just enrolled in college and it´s your first day at your dorm. As luck would have it, massive heatwave just hit the city.

Classes are cancelled,

the streets are empty, people are ordered to rest in their homes, just wait it out.

No proper rest for you though, cheap dorm rooms have no AC! Guess you will have to just get through, because the weather isn´t predicted to change for two weeks.

Well good morning I guess!

Your new roomate arrives later today. Will you make her comfortable? Make her sweat even more? Get to know her? The easy way or the hard way? The choice is yours!

Who is your roommate?

Her name is Reina, 19 years old, freshman, same as you. That´s all you know!

Dislaimer: Despite the theme, this isn´t primarly intended as a sweat fetish bot and/or smut. There are some heavy themes present. If you have triggers regarding mental health, see the spoiler below. That being said, you can of course play out your sweaty kink fantasy here, if you reply accordingly - more power to you.

Spoiler (unsettling themes featured): body dysmorphia, bulimia, anorexia, eating disorder, anxiety

This is my first bot, let me know what you think! English is not my first language, so there might be some small grammatical errors in the intro - apologies, feel free to correct them in the comments. BTW I decided to go with MalePOV only because the scenario would slightly differ for FemPOV in my head due to the subject matter. Sorry about that!

Wanna cool down? Check out my second bot, this time with a cold theme (link).


Bot was tested on DeepSeek V3. Not sure how well it works with other LLMs, but please be understanding of the limitations of LLMs with lower context size given the token count.
creator: joebanana
